steps.title: Identify the comparison signal
steps.content: The phrase makes a direct comparison, connecting the mantis-study filters to 3D movie glasses. This link between something technical and something familiar signals a clarifying comparison meant to aid understanding.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
A comparison to a familiar example helps readers understand the experimental setup by making it relatable.

Choices B, C, and
  • D misidentify the phrase's function: B wrongly treats it as comparing research methods
  • C misreads it as describing an earlier use rather than as a clarifying analogy
  • D invents a problem that doesn't exist
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
